projectDescription: Interactive esports uniform customization platform with 3D visualization and order management
keyFeatures: Interactive 3D shirt visualization using React Three Fiber
Multi-step customization workflow (fabric, design, colors, text, logo)
Player roster management with individual jersey customization
Order management and contact form integration
Four shirt style options: V-neck, Round neck, Tank top, Camisola
publicApiSurface: Home - Landing page with shirt selection
Customize - Main customization interface with sidebar controls
Sidebar - Collapsible sections for fabric, colors, text, logo, players
SelectedData - Order summary and player details
ColorPalette - Color selection component with 42 preset colors
